content.en:
The Pathless Tower, among the main towers.

A super-perfect master has arrived.

"I've seen a lot of tower masters!"

These super-perfect controllers said very respectfully.

At this time, the Lord of the Infinite Dao said, "Everyone, you are the Super Perfect Masters of our Daoless Tower, and now the Lord of Infinity has broken through to the Super Perfect Master, and after our decision, we hope that he can serve as the fourteenth tower master of the Daoless Tower. However, there are also tower owners who disagree, believing that the Endless Lord is not qualified enough. Now, I am in charge, let the Endless Lord and you, the Super Perfect Masters, besiege Ye Tian together, if Ye Tian wins, it will be the fourteenth tower master of the Daoless Tower. If Ye Tian failed, then the matter of becoming the master of the fourteenth tower should not be mentioned. "

"What, the Lord of Endless has become the Lord of Tower Fourteen, who is this?"

A super-perfect master has been in retreat, so he doesn't know Ye Tian very well.

But soon, as soon as the other super-perfect controllers introduced this one, the other party immediately understood.

I have to say that Ye Tian is very demonic, he comprehended the extreme path in the realm of creating an extreme realm in half a step, and soon became a super perfect controller after breaking through the perfect controller.

However, even so, if Ye Tian wanted to become a tower master, they would not agree.

Who doesn't want to be the tower master? They want to too, so naturally they don't want to give up the position of tower master to Ye Tian.

"Lord of Time, this time, you must also go all out, and you must not leave your hands behind!" said the Lord of the Pathless Path.

"Good!"

The Lord of Time.

Although he had a very good relationship with Ye Tian, the Lord of Endless, he didn't dare to keep his hand, otherwise the other tower masters would be afraid that they would reprimand him.

Airplanes!!!!

The void was derived, and a piece of time and space was condensed, serving as a battlefield between Ye Tian and these super-perfect controllers.

A super-perfect master is waiting for them, and they will not leave their hands behind.

At this moment, the aura of the Extreme Dao appeared on their bodies one after another, and they were able to become super-perfect controllers, which one of them had not comprehended the Extreme Dao?

Comprehending the Extreme Path is a necessary condition for becoming a super-perfect master, but most of them have only mastered one Extreme Path, and the Lord of Time is slightly better, he has mastered the three Extreme Paths of Time, the Extreme Path of Light, and the Extreme Path of Speed, but the best at it is the Extreme Path of Time.

......

"Canggu, do you think the Endless Lord can win?"

The Lord of the Pathless asked.

"There is no way, the Lord of Endless can easily win, and this group of super-perfect masters poses no threat to him!" said the Lord of the Ancients.

He knew very well that Ye Tian had comprehended too many Extreme Dao, and he had broken through to the Perfect Controller with his own Extreme Dao, and his Extreme Dao Ancestor was also the top Extreme Dao Ancestor, what did other super-level Perfect Masters compare to Ye Tian?

"Oh, Lord of the Ancients, you have a high opinion of the Lord of Endless, and you also suggested that the Lord of Endless become the Lord of the Fourteenth Tower, even if he breaks through with the Extreme Dao of Time and Space, he has not completely grown up yet!"

The Lord of the Infinite Dao's understanding of Ye Tian was limited to what was rumored in the outside world, and Ye Tian had comprehended several extreme paths, including the time pole path and the space pole path.

Therefore, the Lord of the Infinite Dao still thought that Ye Tian had broken through with the Space-Time Pole Dao and condensed the Space-Time Pole Dao Ancestor.

But in fact, the number of extreme paths that Ye Tian comprehended was far beyond his imagination.

"Wudao, you haven't paid attention to the Endless Lord, his potential is far beyond your imagination!" said the Ancient Lord mysteriously.

"Then I'm looking forward to it!"

The Tower of the Pathless smiled.

At this time, Ye Tian fought with the Lord of Time.

Bang!!!!

These super-perfect controllers have made a move, and as soon as they make a move, they are extremely mastery.

As beings who have comprehended the Extreme Dao and have been super-perfect controllers for a long time, they naturally created the Extreme Dao Control Technique, although it is just an ordinary Extreme Dao Control Technique, but it is also extremely powerful.

With so many super-level perfect controllers performing attack-type extreme control skills together, ordinary super-perfect controllers really don't dare to resist, otherwise they will definitely be hit hard, or even killed in seconds.

However.

Ye Tian didn't use the Extreme Dao Control Technique at all, he just punched him.

The power of the Endless Extreme Dao Perfect Ancestor exploded, shattering everything with one punch, and even the Extreme Dao Control Technique of these super perfect controllers was also shattered by Ye Tian's punch.

And there were a few Extreme Dao control techniques that fell on Ye Tian's body, and they couldn't shake Ye Tian's Extreme Dao Ancestor at all, and they didn't break the defense at all.

Bang!!!!

Many super-perfect controllers were shocked one after another, and the super-perfect ancestors on their bodies couldn't withstand the aftermath of the punch, and their bodies cracked, vomiting blood, and were seriously injured.

And the Lord of Time was also injured, he rushed to the front, collided with Ye Tian head-on, one arm was directly shattered, and it was difficult to recover, and there was no way to recover his arm for a while.

"Such a terrifying power, it can simply shatter the Extreme Dao, and it is difficult to recover even the recovery speed of the super-level perfect ancestor. "

The Lord of Time was secretly surprised.

At this time, the other tower owners were also confused.

"The Endless Lord didn't use the Extreme Dao Control Technique, he just used the Extreme Dao Ancestor Body to defeat their joint force with one punch, such an Extreme Dao Ancestor Body is too terrifying!"

"Could it be that the Lord of Infinity really has the near-invincible combat power of a super-perfect master?"

"There's almost no need to test, the Lord of Time is not an opponent, and they can't shake the Lord of Endless at all!"

And the Lord of the Daoless also shrank his pupils, and he was really shocked.

"The Space-Time Extreme Dao Ancestor Body shouldn't have such a terrifying body!"

The Lord of the Pathless Secret Path.

He is also the perfect controller of the space-time extreme path breakthrough, and he also knows what it is like to have a super-perfect controller of the space-time extreme path ancestor, and there is definitely no such terrifying demon.

"The perfect controller of his own extreme breakthrough!"

The Lord of the Pathless Dao thought of it, and immediately interrogated the Lord of the Canggu, "Lord of the Canggu, Ye Tian has broken through to the perfect controller with his own extreme path, right?"

"Yes!"

The Lord of the Ancient nodded slightly.

"So, Ye Tian condensed the Extreme Dao Will in the Extreme Realm in half a step, and even at the end of the Realm, it was too difficult to condense the Extreme Dao Will, could it be that you would help him at all costs?"

"Wudao, I don't have that ability!" the Lord of the Ancient Dynasty smiled bitterly, "You should also know how many Extreme Dao treasures are needed to condense the will of the Extreme Dao, do you think I can collect so many Extreme Dao treasures? This is not a matter of strength, it is a matter of luck, I can't buy so many Extreme Dao treasures at all, as for looking for them, what kind of luck against the sky!"

The Lord of the Daoless was even more surprised, "So, Ye Tian is on his own?"

"It should be so, anyway, I only gave him a little bit of green zero liquid, and the effect can be said to be a drop in the bucket!"

The Lord of the Pathless Dao looked deeply at Ye Tian in the distance, and his heart was simply shocked to the extreme.

"Demon, as long as he doesn't fall, he will surpass us in the future!"

The Lord of the Pathless muttered.
